steps.title: Use the example signal
steps.content: The passage first says several nonhuman primates use tools. It then gives crab-eating macaques in Malaysia as an example of primates that use stone tools to open nuts and oysters.

steps.title: Reject unsupported comparisons
steps.content: B says the macaques use other tools, which the text does not state. C compares their skill with dolphins, and D compares how long different primates have used tools; neither comparison appears in the passage. The remaining statement follows from the example. The answer is A.
